name: camelagi
description: Personal AI agent powered by Claude Agent SDK — manage everything from Telegram

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run bundle:gateway
scripts.compile: npm run build && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=release/camelagi-darwin-arm64
scripts.compile:all: npm run build && mkdir -p release && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=release/camelagi-darwin-arm64 && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile=release/camelagi-darwin-x64 && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile=release/camelagi-linux-x64 && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile=release/camelagi-linux-arm64

author: Nawaf Almutairi
